name: Green Tomato Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe By: Traditional Home June/July 1993
Categories: Vegetables
This is an award-winning recipe that was served at a 4th of July celebration. In a 9-inch dish, make a crust with Bisquick. Layer onions; green tomatoes. Mix mayonnaise, lemon juice, chives and cheese. Pour into crust and bake until cheese gets bubbly and top browns. You can use other things besides chives (parsley, basil, etc.), but you must use real mayonnaise.
